Name: Frankensurfer
Description: Ludwig Frankenstein made a monster using the Silver Surfer as a model and duplicated all of the Surfer's powers onto an empty body. The result was a murderous slave with the Power Cosmic and his own silver surfboard. After devastating Earth and terrorising Frankenstein's enemies, Frankensurfer was defeated by the real Silver Surfer.
